name: Quacker Jacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop corn and keep it warm in the oven.
2. Warm the nuts in a pan.
3. In a saucepan, melt the butter. Add brown sugar and light corn syrup, then cook until thickened.
4. Add baking soda to the mixture and stir well.
5. Pour the mixture over the warmed popped corn and peanuts.
6. Stir everything together to ensure even coating.
7. Let it cool before enjoying your Quacker Jacks.
